Title: Verify Draft status badge in grid
Preconditions: Draft page exists; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-draft
2. Locate draft page in grid
3. Verify Draft badge is displayed in Status column
Assertions: Draft badge (pill) visible next to the page name in Status column; page may also show Personalized badge
Failure_Signals: No Draft badge visible; page appears in wrong lifecycle tab

Title: Verify Published status badge in grid
Preconditions: Published page exists; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-active
2. Locate published page in grid
3. Verify Published badge is displayed in Status column
Assertions: Published badge (pill) visible in Status column; page may also show Scheduled and/or Personalized badges
Failure_Signals: No Published badge visible; page missing from Active tab

Title: Verify Archived status badge in grid
Preconditions: Archived page exists; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-archived
2. Locate archived page in grid
3. Verify Archived badge is displayed in Status column
Assertions: Archived badge (pill) visible in Status column
Failure_Signals: No Archived badge visible; page missing from Archived tab

Title: Verify Scheduled badge in grid
Preconditions: Page with scheduled dates (StartDate or EndDate) exists; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-active (or Archived for expired)
2. Locate page with scheduled dates in grid
3. Verify Scheduled badge is displayed alongside Published badge in Status column
Assertions: Scheduled badge (pill) visible next to Published badge for pages with date restrictions
Failure_Signals: No Scheduled badge visible on pages that have StartDate/EndDate configured

Title: Verify Personalized badge in grid
Preconditions: Page with visibility=false or user group restrictions exists; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Navigate to any lifecycle tab in PageBuilder shell (Draft, Active, or Archived)
2. Locate page with personalization settings (visibility off, user groups, or organization restrictions)
3. Verify Personalized badge is displayed in Status column
Assertions: Personalized badge (pill) visible in Status column alongside the page's lifecycle badge (Draft/Published/Archived)
Failure_Signals: No Personalized badge on pages that have visibility or user group restrictions configured

Title: Grid columns display correctly
Preconditions: Multiple pages exist; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-all
2. Verify all grid columns are visible: Name, Language, Permalink, Modified, Modified by, Status
Assertions: All 6 columns rendered with sortable headers; data populates correctly for each column
Failure_Signals: Missing columns; column data not rendering; sort not functional

Title: Checkbox selection and bulk selection
Preconditions: Multiple pages exist; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Navigate to any lifecycle tab in PageBuilder shell
2. Click individual row checkboxes to select pages
3. Click Select All checkbox in header row
4. Verify Archive toolbar button becomes enabled when pages are selected
Assertions: Individual checkboxes toggle selection; Select All selects all visible rows; Archive button activates on selection
Failure_Signals: Checkboxes not clickable; Select All not working; Archive button stays disabled

Title: Search functionality in page list
Preconditions: Multiple pages exist; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Navigate to All Pages tab in PageBuilder shell
2. Enter search term in Search field
3. Verify filtered results display matching pages
Assertions: Search filters page list to show only pages matching the keyword (by Name or Permalink); results update as user types
Failure_Signals: Search returns no results for valid terms; search field not present

Title: Published page accessible on frontend (correct language)
Preconditions: PAGE-1 published via CMS-006 OR PAGE-3 seeded (both EN+DE published)
Test_Data: PAGE-1: ${FRONT_URL}/qa-homepage-spring-sale; PAGE-3 EN: ${FRONT_URL}/en/qa-return-policy; PAGE-3 DE: ${FRONT_URL}/de/qa-return-policy (see test-data/cms/pagebuilder-pages.md)
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/qa-homepage-spring-sale (PAGE-1, EN)
2. Verify the page loads with HTTP 200 and all blocks render
3. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/en/qa-return-policy (PAGE-3, EN) — verify EN title
4. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/de/qa-return-policy (PAGE-3, DE) — verify DE title
Assertions: Page renders at the correct URL with status 200; page title and content blocks match the published version; no 404 or error page displayed
Cross_Layer_Checks: API: GET /api/pages confirms page status=Published; Admin: page shows Published badge in Active tab
Failure_Signals: Page returns 404 or blank; content does not match published version; HTTP error in Network tab

Title: Published page 404 on frontend - wrong language
Preconditions: PAGE-3 seeded with EN+DE published; French NOT published
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/fr/qa-return-policy (French not published for PAGE-3)
2. Verify page is not accessible
Assertions: Page returns 404 or redirects to 404 page; no content from the EN or DE version is served under /fr/ prefix
Failure_Signals: Page loads successfully in wrong language; English/German content served under /fr/ prefix

Title: Draft page NOT accessible on frontend
Preconditions: PAGE-1 in Draft status (before CMS-006 publish step)
Test_Data: PAGE-1 from test-data/cms/pagebuilder-pages.md: ${FRONT_URL}/qa-homepage-spring-sale → expected 404 while Draft
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/qa-homepage-spring-sale while PAGE-1 is still in Draft status (before publishing)
2. Attempt to access the page
Assertions: Page returns 404 or redirects to a 404/not-found page; draft content is NOT visible to anonymous or authenticated storefront users
Failure_Signals: Draft page renders with content visible; HTTP 200 returned for draft URL

Title: Archived page NOT accessible on frontend
Preconditions: Page in Archived status; permalink known
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink> for the archived page
2. Attempt to access the page
Assertions: Page returns 404 or redirects to a 404/not-found page; archived content is NOT visible on storefront
Failure_Signals: Archived page renders with content visible; HTTP 200 returned for archived URL

Title: Published page appears in search suggestions
Preconditions: Published page exists with a unique title/keyword; search index is up to date
Test_Data: Page title or unique keyword from published page content; See test-data/cms/pagebuilder-pages.md
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}
2. Click the search bar and type the page title keyword
3. Wait for the search suggestions dropdown to appear
4. Review the suggestions list for the page
Assertions: Published page title appears in the search suggestions dropdown with a clickable link; clicking the suggestion navigates to the page
Failure_Signals: Published page absent from search suggestions after 60s; suggestions dropdown does not show page title; page only appears in search results grid but NOT in dropdown

Title: Draft page NOT in search suggestions
Preconditions: Draft page exists; its title/keyword is unique and not present in any published page
Test_Data: Draft page unique title keyword; See test-data/cms/pagebuilder-pages.md
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}
2. Click the search bar and type the draft page title keyword
3. Wait for the search suggestions dropdown to appear
4. Review the suggestions list
Assertions: Draft page does NOT appear in the search suggestions dropdown; suggestions show only published pages or no results for the keyword
Failure_Signals: Draft page title appears in search suggestions; draft content visible in suggestion snippets

Title: Scheduled page with future start date - not accessible
Preconditions: PAGE-4 seeded with StartDate +7 days (must still be in future — if passed, re-seed)
Test_Data: PAGE-4 from test-data/cms/pagebuilder-pages.md: ${FRONT_URL}/qa-summer-collection-preview → expected 404 before StartDate
Steps:
1. Confirm current time is before PAGE-4's StartDate (check Scheduling section in admin)
2. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/qa-summer-collection-preview
3. Attempt to access the scheduled page
Assertions: Page returns 404 or not-found page; scheduled content is not served before its start date
Cross_Layer_Checks: Admin: PAGE-4 appears in Pending tab with Scheduled badge
Failure_Signals: Page content visible before StartDate; HTTP 200 for scheduled-but-not-yet-active page

Title: Scheduled page within valid date range - accessible
Preconditions: PAGE-4 modified: StartDate set to past, EndDate still in future; page is Published
Test_Data: PAGE-4 from test-data/cms/pagebuilder-pages.md: temporarily adjust StartDate to past for this test; ${FRONT_URL}/qa-summer-collection-preview → expected 200
Steps:
1. In admin, update PAGE-4 StartDate to a past date (keep EndDate in future)
2. Confirm current time is between StartDate and EndDate
3. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/qa-summer-collection-preview
4. Access the scheduled page
Assertions: Page returns HTTP 200 with content; all 6 blocks render correctly within the valid scheduled range
Failure_Signals: Page returns 404 during valid date range; content not rendered
Cleanup: Restore PAGE-4 StartDate to +7 days for future CMS-033 runs

Title: Search suggestions return only current language pages
Preconditions: PAGE-3 seeded with both EN (QA Return Policy) and DE (QA Rückgaberichtlinie) published
Test_Data: PAGE-3 from test-data/cms/pagebuilder-pages.md: EN keyword=Return Policy, DE keyword=Rückgaberichtlinie; See Language Verification Matrix
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/en/ and type 'Return Policy' in search bar
2. Verify search suggestions dropdown shows PAGE-3 EN title and does NOT show DE title
3. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/de/ and type 'Rückgaberichtlinie' in search bar
4. Verify search suggestions dropdown shows PAGE-3 DE title only
Assertions: Search suggestions in /en/ context return only English-language pages; suggestions in /de/ context return only German-language pages; no cross-language contamination in dropdown
Failure_Signals: English search suggestions show German-language page; language-specific isolation broken in suggestions dropdown

Title: Add section to page
Preconditions: Page open in designer at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Open a draft page in the PageBuilder designer
2. Click the Add block button (+ icon or 'Add block' label) in the designer
3. Select a block type (e.g., 'Title') from the block library panel
4. Verify the block appears in the sections panel on the left
5. Click the new section to open its configuration
6. Enter content in the configuration fields
7. Click Save
Assertions: New section block appears in the left sections panel after selection; section configuration panel opens on click; Save completes without error; section persists after save
Failure_Signals: Block not appearing after selection; configuration panel not opening; Save button disabled or Save fails; console errors on add

Title: Copy and Paste section via context menu
Preconditions: Page has at least one section in the designer
Steps:
1. Open a page in the PageBuilder designer that has at least one existing section
2. Right-click on an existing section in the left panel to open the context menu
3. Click 'Copy' from the context menu (content_copy icon)
4. Right-click on the same or another section
5. Click 'Paste after' from the context menu (content_paste icon)
6. Verify a copy of the section appears below the target section in the sections panel
7. Right-click again and click 'Paste before'
8. Verify a copy appears above the target section
9. Click Save
Assertions: Context menu opens on right-click with Copy/Paste before/Paste after options; copied section can be pasted before or after any section; pasted section has identical content; Save persists all pasted sections
Failure_Signals: Context menu not opening on right-click; Copy/Paste options missing; pasted section empty or corrupted; Save fails after paste
References: C221166; Updated: context menu discovery COV-2026-03-25-1630

Title: Delete section via context menu
Preconditions: Page has at least one section in the designer (not the last section — keep at least one)
Steps:
1. Open a page in the PageBuilder designer with at least 2 sections
2. Right-click on a section in the left panel to open the context menu
3. Click 'Delete' from the context menu (delete_outline icon)
4. If a confirmation dialog appears, confirm the deletion
5. Verify the section is removed from the sections panel
6. Verify the live preview no longer shows the deleted block
7. Click Save
Assertions: Context menu shows Delete option; section is removed from the left panel after clicking Delete; live preview updates immediately; Save completes; deleted section does not reappear on page reload
Failure_Signals: Context menu not showing Delete; section not removed after click; preview still showing deleted block; section reappears after save
References: C221167; Updated: context menu discovery COV-2026-03-25-1630

Title: Simple text block - add and preview
Preconditions: Page open in designer
Steps:
1. Click Add block in the designer
2. Select 'Simple Text' from the block library
3. In the General tab, enter formatted text content
4. Switch to the Settings tab and configure alignment or padding options
5. Verify the live preview updates with the text content
6. Click Save
Assertions: Simple Text block added to sections panel; General tab accepts text input; Settings tab shows layout options; live preview renders the text block; Save completes without error
Failure_Signals: Block not in library; General tab not showing text field; preview not reflecting content; Save fails

Title: Simple image block - add and preview
Preconditions: Page open in designer
Steps:
1. Click Add block in the designer
2. Select 'Simple Image' from the block library
3. In the General tab, upload an image using the image upload field
4. Switch to Settings tab and configure image display options
5. Verify the live preview shows the uploaded image
6. Click Save
Assertions: Simple Image block added; image upload field accepts image file; preview renders the image; Settings tab has display options; Save completes
Failure_Signals: Block not in library; image upload failing; preview not showing image; Settings tab empty; Save fails

Title: Text over image block - add and preview
Preconditions: Page open in designer
Steps:
1. Click Add block in the designer
2. Select 'Text Over Image' from the block library
3. Configure the background image using the upload/select field
4. Enter overlay text in the text field
5. Verify live preview shows text overlaid on the image
6. Click Save
Assertions: Text Over Image block added; image and text fields both present; preview renders text overlaid on image; Save completes
Failure_Signals: Block not in library; image or text field missing; text not appearing over image in preview; Save fails

Title: Cards list block - add and preview
Preconditions: Page open in designer
Steps:
1. Click Add block in the designer
2. Select 'Cards List' from the block library
3. Click Add card item and fill in title, description, and image for the card
4. Add at least 2 card items
5. Verify live preview renders the cards grid
6. Click Save
Assertions: Cards List block added; individual cards can be added with title/description/image; preview renders card grid; minimum 2 cards display; Save completes

Title: Two columns list block - add and preview
Preconditions: Page open in designer
Steps:

2. Configure both columns
3. Preview

Title: Video and text block - add and preview
Preconditions: Page open in designer
Steps:

3. Preview

Title: Page builder field types - text and rich text
Preconditions: Section editing open in designer at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Open a page in the PageBuilder designer and add or open a section that contains text, rich text, image, and select field types
2. In the text field: enter plain text and verify it saves
3. In the rich text field: apply bold, italic, and add a hyperlink; verify formatting toolbar is present
4. In the image field: upload an image and verify thumbnail preview
5. In the select/dropdown field: choose an option and verify selection persists
6. Click Save and verify all field values persist
Assertions: Text field accepts and saves plain text; rich text editor shows formatting toolbar with bold/italic/link options; image field shows thumbnail after upload; select field retains chosen option; all values persist after Save
Failure_Signals: Text field not editable; rich text toolbar missing; image upload failing; select field options not loading; values reset after Save

Preconditions: CMS designer open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:

2. Click 'Theme settings' in the top toolbar
3. In the Presets section, select the 'Blue' preset
4. Verify the live preview updates with blue color scheme
5. Click Save
Assertions: Blue preset selected and applied; live preview updates to show blue primary colors on buttons, headings, and accents; Save persists the preset
Failure_Signals: Presets section not visible; Blue preset not in list; preview not updating on selection; Save fails

Steps:

Title: Custom colors - background and text
Preconditions: CMS designer open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Open a page in the PageBuilder designer
2. Click 'Theme settings' in the top toolbar
3. Navigate to Colors > General section
4. Set a custom Background color using the color picker
5. Set a custom Text color
6. Set a custom Headings color
7. Verify the live preview updates with the new colors
8. Click Save
Assertions: Background, Text, and Headings color inputs accept hex/color picker values; live preview updates in real-time for each change; Save persists all three custom colors
Failure_Signals: Color pickers not opening; values not accepted; preview not updating; Save resets colors to default

Preconditions: CMS designer open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:

Failure_Signals: Color pickers not opening; values not accepted; preview not reflecting button/link color changes; Save resets colors

Title: Section settings - Image with text
Preconditions: Image with text section exists in a page open in the designer
Steps:
1. Open a page in the PageBuilder designer that contains an Image with text section
2. Click the section to open its configuration panel
3. Review all available settings options (layout, alignment, padding, image position)
4. Modify at least one setting (e.g., change image alignment to right)
5. Verify live preview reflects the setting change
6. Click Save
Assertions: Image with text section configuration panel shows layout/alignment/padding options; setting changes reflect in live preview; Save persists the updated settings
Failure_Signals: Configuration panel empty; settings changes not reflecting in preview; Save fails or resets settings

Title: Multiple badge combinations
Preconditions: Pages with various status/configuration combinations; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Navigate to Active tab in PageBuilder shell
2. Locate pages with multiple badges: Published+Scheduled, Published+Personalized, Published+Scheduled+Personalized
3. Navigate to Archived tab — locate pages with Archived+Scheduled badges
4. Verify all badge combinations render correctly without overlap
Assertions: Multiple badges display side by side in Status column (e.g. 'Published Scheduled Personalized'); badges are legible and don't overflow the cell
Failure_Signals: Badges overlapping; missing badges on pages with multiple statuses; layout broken with 3 badges

Title: Cross-browser compatibility - Chrome and Edge
Preconditions: CMS module accessible; admin user credentials available
Steps:
1. Open ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) in Chrome
2. Verify page list loads, grid columns render, and badge display is correct
3. Open ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) in Edge
4. Repeat grid and badge verification steps
5. Compare results between browsers
Assertions: PageBuilder shell loads and functions identically in Chrome and Edge; no layout differences in grid columns or badge display; all toolbar buttons accessible in both browsers
Failure_Signals: Page fails to load in one browser; grid columns missing or misaligned; badges rendering differently across browsers; JS errors in console

Title: Rich Text Field Type — Add Rich Text Content Block
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend; page exists in Page Builder designer
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) and open an existing page
2. Click Open Designer to enter the page builder
3. Add a new section or open an existing section that contains a Rich Text field
4. Click on the Rich Text field to open the rich text editor
5. Enter formatted text content: apply bold, apply italic, and insert a hyperlink
6. Click Save or apply the changes
7. Preview the page and verify rich text renders correctly
Assertions: Rich text editor opens with formatting toolbar; bold, italic, and hyperlink controls are present and functional; formatted content saves without data loss; preview renders bold/italic text and clickable hyperlinks correctly
Failure_Signals: Rich text editor not opening; formatting toolbar missing; bold/italic not applying; hyperlinks not saving; formatted content displaying as raw HTML in preview

Title: Designer — Viewport switching (Desktop/Tablet/Mobile)
Preconditions: Page open in designer at ${BACK_URL}/Modules/$(VirtoCommerce.PageBuilderModule)/Content/page-builder-designer/index.html?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Open a page in the designer
2. Click the Desktop dropdown in the top-left toolbar
3. Select Tablet viewport
4. Verify the live preview iframe resizes to tablet width
5. Select Mobile viewport
6. Verify the live preview iframe resizes to mobile width
7. Switch back to Desktop
8. Verify the preview returns to full width
Assertions: Preview iframe width changes per viewport selection; content reflows responsively; toolbar shows current viewport name
Failure_Signals: Viewport dropdown not opening; preview not resizing; layout breaks on switch

Title: Designer — Block library search
Preconditions: Page open in designer; Add block panel visible
Steps:
1. Open the Add block panel in the designer
2. Type 'Product' in the 'Search in library' textbox
3. Verify filtered results show only blocks matching 'Product' (Products, Products carousel, Predefined products)
4. Clear the search field
5. Verify all 15 block types are displayed again
6. Search for a non-existent block name (e.g. 'xyz123')
7. Verify empty or no-results state
Assertions: Search filters block library in real-time; clearing restores full list; non-match shows appropriate empty state
Failure_Signals: Search not filtering; blocks disappearing after clear; JS error on search

Title: Designer — Save and Publish from toolbar
Preconditions: Page open in designer with at least one section added
Steps:
1. Open a draft page in the designer
2. Add a new Text block and enter content
3. Verify Save button becomes enabled
4. Click Save
5. Verify Save completes (button becomes disabled again or shows success)
6. Click Publish button in toolbar
7. Verify page status transitions to Published
8. Verify Unpublish button becomes enabled
Assertions: Save persists changes without navigation; Publish transitions status; Unpublish becomes available after publish
Cross_Layer_Checks: STOREFRONT: Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink> — page renders with HTTP 200 after publish; ADMIN: Page appears in Active tab of PageBuilder shell with Published badge
Failure_Signals: Save button stays disabled after changes; Publish fails silently; status not updating

Title: Designer — Pages dropdown navigation
Preconditions: Multiple pages exist in Page Builder; designer is open
Steps:

2. Verify a list of existing pages appears
3. Select a different page from the dropdown
4. Verify the designer loads the selected page content in the left panel and preview iframe
5. Verify the page sections update to reflect the new page
Assertions: Pages dropdown lists available pages; selecting a page loads its content; sections panel and preview update
Failure_Signals: Dropdown empty; page not loading on selection; preview showing wrong page content

Title: Designer — Page Header and Settings sections
Preconditions: Page open in designer with Settings and Page Header sections visible in left panel
Steps:

2. Verify settings panel opens with page-level configuration fields (e.g., Page Header / H1, Hide Breadcrumbs)
3. Edit the Page Header / H1 text field
4. Toggle the Hide Breadcrumbs checkbox
5. Click the Page Header section
6. Verify page header configuration options appear
7. Save changes and verify preview reflects updated header
Assertions: Settings panel shows page-level fields; changes to H1 and breadcrumbs reflect in preview; both sections are editable
Failure_Signals: Settings panel empty or errors; changes not persisting; preview not updating

Steps:

7. Check live preview renders the curated product list
Assertions: Predefined products block added; manual product picker available; preview shows selected products in configured order
Failure_Signals: Block not adding; product picker not finding products; order not persisting

Title: Designer — Add and configure FavoriteProducts block
Preconditions: Page open in designer; user is logged in
Steps:
1. Click Add block in the designer
2. Select 'FavoriteProducts' from the library
3. Verify the block is added to the sections panel
4. Click the new section to configure
5. Configure display settings (max items, layout)
6. Check live preview renders favorite/wishlist products widget
Assertions: FavoriteProducts block added; display settings configurable; preview shows wishlist widget (may show empty state if user has no favorites)
Failure_Signals: Block not adding; configuration panel empty; preview error

Title: Designer — Add and configure Slider block

Steps:

2. Select 'Slider' from the library
3. Verify the block is added to the sections panel
4. Click the new section to configure
5. Add slide items with images and optional text overlays
6. Configure transition settings (auto-play, duration)
7. Check live preview renders image slider with navigation
Assertions: Slider block added; multiple slides can be added; transition settings available; preview shows image slider with dots/arrows navigation
Failure_Signals: Block not adding; slides not uploading; slider not transitioning in preview

Title: Designer — Add and configure Subscribe form block
Preconditions: Page open in designer
Steps:
1. Click Add block in the designer
2. Select 'Subscribe form' from the library
3. Verify the block is added to the sections panel
4. Click the new section to configure
5. Configure form fields (email placeholder, button text, success message)
6. Check live preview renders newsletter subscription form
Assertions: Subscribe form block added; form fields configurable; preview shows email input and subscribe button
Failure_Signals: Block not adding; form fields missing; preview not rendering form

Title: Designer — Add and configure Login block
Preconditions: Page open in designer
Steps:
1. Click Add block in the designer
2. Select 'Login' from the library
3. Verify the block is added to the sections panel
4. Click the new section to configure
5. Configure login form display options
6. Check live preview renders embedded login form
Assertions: Login block added; configuration options available; preview shows login form with username/password fields
Failure_Signals: Block not adding; login form not rendering; authentication conflict in preview

Title: Designer — Add and configure Title block
Preconditions: Page open in designer
Steps:
1. Click Add block in the designer
2. Select 'Title' from the library
3. Verify the block is added to the sections panel
4. Click the new section to configure
5. Enter heading text and select heading level (H1-H6)
6. Configure alignment and styling options
7. Check live preview renders the heading correctly
Assertions: Title block added; heading text and level configurable; preview renders heading with correct size and alignment
Failure_Signals: Block not adding; heading level selector missing; preview not showing title

Title: Designer — Section reorder via drag and drop
Preconditions: Page has at least 3 sections in the designer
Steps:
1. Open a page with multiple sections in the designer
2. Identify the order of sections in the left panel
3. Drag the first section below the second section
4. Verify the sections reorder in the left panel
5. Verify the live preview updates to reflect the new section order
6. Save the page
7. Reopen the page and verify the order is persisted
Assertions: Sections can be dragged to reorder; left panel reflects new order immediately; preview updates; order persists after save and reload
Failure_Signals: Drag not working; order reverting on save; preview not reflecting reorder

Title: Designer — Theme settings panel
Preconditions: Page open in designer
Steps:
1. Click 'Theme settings' button in the top toolbar
2. Verify theme settings panel opens
3. Locate color preset options (Presets section with search)
4. Locate custom color controls (background, text, headings, links, buttons, borders)
5. Modify a color value (e.g., change background color)
6. Verify live preview updates with the new color
7. Click Save to persist theme settings
Assertions: Theme settings panel opens with presets and custom color sections; color changes reflect in real-time preview; settings persist after save
Failure_Signals: Theme settings panel not opening; presets not loading; color changes not reflecting in preview

Title: Designer — Live preview real-time updates
Preconditions: Page open in designer with at least one editable section
Steps:
1. Open a page in the designer with a Text block
2. Click the Text section to open editing
3. Modify the text content in the editing panel
4. Observe the live preview iframe WITHOUT saving
5. Verify the preview updates in real-time as content is edited
6. Add a new block (e.g., Features)
7. Verify the new block appears in the preview immediately
Assertions: Preview iframe updates in real-time as content is edited (no save required); new blocks appear in preview upon adding; section removal reflects in preview immediately
Cross_Layer_Checks: STOREFRONT: After Save+Publish, navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink> to confirm updated content is live (cross-layer publish verification)
Failure_Signals: Preview not updating until save; lag or stale content in preview; iframe errors

Title: Designer — Hide section via context menu
Preconditions: Page has at least one visible section in the designer
Steps:
1. Open a page in the PageBuilder designer with at least one section
2. Right-click on a visible section in the left panel to open the context menu
3. Verify context menu shows 'Hide' option with visibility icon
4. Click 'Hide'
5. Verify the section is visually marked as hidden in the sections panel (e.g., dimmed, strikethrough, or hidden icon)
6. Verify the live preview no longer renders the hidden section's content
7. Click Save
8. Reopen the page — verify the section is still hidden
9. Right-click the hidden section and verify 'Show' or 'Unhide' option appears to toggle it back
Assertions: Section marked as hidden in the left panel after clicking Hide; live preview no longer renders the section content; hidden state persists after Save; section can be toggled back to visible via context menu
Failure_Signals: Hide option missing from context menu; section still visible in preview after hiding; hidden state not persisting after save; no way to unhide the section

Title: Designer — Duplicate section via context menu
Preconditions: Page has at least one section in the designer
Steps:
1. Open a page in the PageBuilder designer with at least one section
2. Note the current number of sections in the left panel
3. Right-click on a section to open the context menu
4. Click 'Duplicate' (file_copy icon)
5. Verify a new section appears immediately below the original
6. Verify the duplicated section has identical content and configuration
7. Click the duplicated section to confirm its fields match the original
8. Click Save
Assertions: Duplicate option in context menu creates an exact copy below the original; duplicated section has same content, settings, and block type; section count increases by 1; Save persists the duplicate
Failure_Signals: Duplicate option missing from context menu; duplicated section empty or has different content; duplicate not appearing in correct position; Save fails after duplicate

Title: Designer — Context menu full interaction
Preconditions: Page has at least 2 sections in the designer
Steps:
1. Open a page in the PageBuilder designer with at least 2 sections
2. Right-click on the first section in the left panel
3. Verify context menu appears with all 6 options: Hide, Copy, Paste before, Paste after, Duplicate, Delete
4. Click away to dismiss the context menu
5. Right-click on the second section
6. Verify the same context menu appears
7. Click 'Copy' on the second section
8. Right-click on the first section
9. Verify 'Paste before' and 'Paste after' are now active/enabled
10. Click 'Paste before'
11. Verify copied section appears above the first section
Assertions: Context menu appears on right-click for any section; all 6 options visible (Hide, Copy, Paste before, Paste after, Duplicate, Delete); Copy enables Paste options; Paste before inserts above target; Paste after inserts below target; menu dismisses on click-away
Failure_Signals: Context menu not appearing; options missing or disabled; Paste not working after Copy; wrong insertion position; menu not dismissing

Title: E2E — Create promotional landing page and publish
Preconditions: Admin logged in; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-draft
Steps:
1. Click Add button in Draft tab toolbar
2. Enter page name 'Summer Sale 2026' and permalink '/summer-sale-2026'
3. Select language 'en-US'
4. Click Save — verify page appears in Draft list
5. Click on the new page to open the page blade
6. Click Open Designer to open the visual editor
7. Add a Title block — enter 'Summer Sale - Up to 50% Off'
8. Add a Products block — configure to show products from a category
9. Add a Call to Action block — configure button text 'Shop Now'
10. Verify live preview shows all 3 blocks rendered
11. Click Save in designer toolbar
12. Click Publish in designer toolbar
13. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/summer-sale-2026
14. Verify page renders with title, products grid, and CTA button
Assertions: Page created in Draft; designer opens with empty canvas; blocks add and configure; preview renders all blocks; Save+Publish succeeds; storefront renders the page at correct permalink with all content
Cross_Layer_Checks: ADMIN: Page moves from Draft tab to Active tab with Published badge; API: GET page-builder-pages/search returns page with status=Published
Failure_Signals: Page creation fails; designer blocks not adding; preview blank; Publish fails; storefront returns 404 after publish; content missing on storefront
Cleanup: Delete test page via Archive after test

Title: E2E — Edit published page and verify storefront update
Preconditions: Published page exists with known permalink (e.g. from CMS-078)
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-active
2. Click on a published page to open blade
3. Click Open Designer
4. Modify existing text block content — change heading text
5. Add a new Image block below the existing content
6. Click Save — verify changes persist
7. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink>
8. Verify the OLD content still shows (not yet re-published)
9. Go back to designer and click Publish
10. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink> again
11. Verify the NEW content now appears (updated heading + new image)
Assertions: Editing a published page creates a draft version; Save persists edits without affecting live storefront; Publish pushes changes to storefront; storefront reflects updated content only after Publish
Cross_Layer_Checks: ADMIN: Page shows HasChanges indicator in Active tab after save but before publish
Failure_Signals: Edit not saving; storefront showing edited content before Publish (premature publish); Publish not updating storefront; new image block missing on storefront

Title: E2E — Archive page and verify storefront 404
Preconditions: Published page exists with known permalink
Steps:
1. Verify page is accessible on storefront: navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink> — expect HTTP 200
2. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-active
3. Select the page checkbox
4. Click Archive toolbar button
5. Confirm archive action if prompted
6. Verify page moves from Active tab to Archived tab
7. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink>
8. Verify page returns 404 / not found
Assertions: Published page accessible before archive; Archive action moves page to Archived tab; storefront returns 404 after archive; page content not accessible to any user
Cross_Layer_Checks: ADMIN: Page counter decreases in Active tab, increases in Archived tab
Failure_Signals: Archive button not working; page still accessible on storefront after archive; page stuck in Active tab; 404 not shown

Title: Multi-language — Create page in EN, add DE translation
Preconditions: Admin logged in; store has en-US and de-DE languages configured
Steps:
1. Navigate to PageBuilder shell Draft tab
2. Click Add — create page with name 'ML Test Page', language 'en-US', permalink '/ml-test'
3. Click Save
4. Open the page and click Open Designer
5. Add a Title block with text 'Welcome to Our Store'
6. Save and Publish
7. Verify ${FRONT_URL}/ml-test shows 'Welcome to Our Store'
8. Go back to PageBuilder shell — click Add again
9. Create page with name 'ML Test Seite', language 'de-DE', permalink '/ml-test'
10. Open designer, add Title block with text 'Willkommen in unserem Shop'
11. Save and Publish
12. Verify ${FRONT_URL}/de/ml-test shows 'Willkommen in unserem Shop'
13. Verify ${FRONT_URL}/ml-test still shows English version
Assertions: Both language versions created with same permalink; each language version renders correct content on storefront with language prefix; /ml-test serves EN by default; /de/ml-test serves DE
Cross_Layer_Checks: ADMIN: Both language versions visible in All Pages tab with different Language column values (en-US and de-DE)
Failure_Signals: Second language creation fails with duplicate permalink error; wrong language content served; language prefix routing broken

Title: Personalization — Page visible only to Wholesaler user group
Preconditions: Page exists in Draft; User groups configured in store (e.g. Wholesaler)
Test_Data: Test page; Wholesaler user group name
Steps:
1. Navigate to PageBuilder shell Draft tab
2. Open an existing draft page blade
3. Expand Personalization section
4. Set Visibility toggle to ON
5. Select 'Wholesaler' from User groups dropdown
6. Click Save
7. Publish the page
8. Log in on storefront as a user in the Wholesaler group
9. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink> — verify page loads (HTTP 200)
10. Log out and navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink> as anonymous user
11. Verify page returns 404 or is not accessible
Assertions: Page with user group restriction is accessible to users in that group; page returns 404 for anonymous users and users not in the restricted group; Personalized badge appears in PageBuilder shell grid
Cross_Layer_Checks: ADMIN: Personalized badge appears on page in Active tab after publish
Failure_Signals: User group dropdown empty; restriction not saving; page accessible to all users regardless of group; page not accessible even to correct group members

Title: Personalization — Organization-restricted page
Preconditions: Page exists; Organizations exist in the system
Steps:
1. Open page blade in PageBuilder shell
2. Expand Personalization section
3. Select an Organization from the dropdown
4. Click Save and Publish
5. Log in on storefront as a user belonging to that organization
6. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink> — verify page loads
7. Log in as a user from a DIFFERENT organization
8. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink> — verify page returns 404
Assertions: Organization-restricted page visible only to members of the selected organization; other org members and anonymous users see 404
Cross_Layer_Checks: ADMIN: Personalized badge shown in grid
Failure_Signals: Organization dropdown empty; restriction not saving; page visible to all orgs

Title: Scheduling — Page appears at start date, disappears at end date
Preconditions: Page exists in Draft; current date/time known
Steps:
1. Open page blade in PageBuilder shell
2. Expand Scheduling section
3. Set Start date to yesterday using datepicker
4. Set End date to tomorrow using datepicker
5. Click Save and Publish
6. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink> — verify page loads (within date range)
7. Go back to page blade, change End date to yesterday
8. Click Save
9. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink> — verify page returns 404 (past end date)
Assertions: Page accessible within scheduled date range; page returns 404 when current date is outside the range; Scheduled badge appears in grid
Cross_Layer_Checks: ADMIN: Page appears in Active tab when within range; moves to Archived tab when past EndDate
Failure_Signals: Datepicker not opening; dates not saving; page accessible outside date range; page not accessible within valid range; Scheduled badge missing

Title: Scheduling — Pending page with future start date
Preconditions: Admin logged in; PageBuilder shell open
Test_Data: Test page; StartDate set to next week
Steps:
1. Create or open a draft page
2. Set Start date to 7 days from now
3. Leave End date empty
4. Save and Publish
5. Verify page appears in Pending tab (not Active)
6. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink> — verify page returns 404
7. Check Pending counter badge in sidebar shows the page
Assertions: Published page with future StartDate appears in Pending tab, not Active; storefront returns 404 before start date; Pending counter reflects the page
Cross_Layer_Checks: ADMIN: Page in Pending tab with Scheduled badge; not in Active tab
Failure_Signals: Page in Active tab instead of Pending; page accessible before start date; Pending counter not updating

Title: Page blade — All configuration fields
Preconditions: Draft page exists in PageBuilder shell
Steps:
1. Navigate to PageBuilder shell and open a draft page blade
2. Verify Basic info section shows: Name (text input), Permalink (text input)
3. Verify Language is displayed
4. Expand Scheduling section — verify Start date and End date datepickers
5. Expand Personalization section — verify: Visibility toggle, User groups dropdown, Organization dropdown
6. Edit Name to a new value and click Save
7. Verify the name updates in the page list
8. Edit Permalink and click Save
9. Verify new permalink is reflected
Assertions: All page blade fields are present and editable: Name, Permalink, Language (read-only after creation), Start/End dates, Visibility, User groups, Organization; changes persist after Save
Failure_Signals: Missing fields in blade; fields not editable; Save not persisting changes; Permalink change not updating in list

Title: Error handling — Duplicate permalink
Preconditions: Admin logged in; a page exists with permalink '/existing-page'
Steps:
1. Navigate to PageBuilder shell Draft tab
2. Click Add to create new page
3. Enter a name and set permalink to '/existing-page' (already taken by another page in same language)
4. Click Save
5. Verify an error message is displayed about duplicate permalink
Assertions: System prevents creation of page with duplicate permalink in same language; error message clearly indicates the permalink is already in use
Failure_Signals: No error shown; duplicate page created; system crashes; vague error message

Title: Error handling — Empty required fields on page creation
Preconditions: Admin logged in; PageBuilder shell open
Steps:
1. Navigate to PageBuilder shell Draft tab
2. Click Add to create new page
3. Leave Name field empty
4. Leave Permalink field empty
5. Attempt to click Save
6. Verify validation errors appear for required fields
Assertions: Save is disabled or validation errors shown for empty Name and Permalink fields; page is not created without required fields
Failure_Signals: Page created with empty name/permalink; no validation errors; Save succeeds with missing data

Title: Error handling — Special characters in permalink
Preconditions: Admin logged in; PageBuilder shell open
Steps:
1. Create new page with permalink containing spaces: '/my page test'
2. Verify system sanitizes or rejects the input
3. Create page with permalink containing special characters: '/page&test?q=1#anchor'
4. Verify system sanitizes or rejects
5. Create page with permalink containing unicode: '/страница-тест'
6. Verify behavior
Assertions: System either sanitizes permalinks (removes/replaces invalid characters) or shows clear validation error; no server errors; pages with sanitized permalinks are accessible on storefront
Failure_Signals: Server error 500; permalink accepted with invalid characters causing routing issues; storefront crash on special character URL

Title: Edge case — Page with maximum sections
Preconditions: Admin logged in; test page in designer
Steps:
1. Open a draft page in the designer
2. Add blocks repeatedly (e.g. Title blocks) until you have 20+ sections
3. Verify the sections panel scrolls properly
4. Verify the live preview renders all sections
5. Click Save — verify no timeout or error
6. Reopen the page — verify all sections persisted
Assertions: Designer handles many sections without performance degradation; sections panel scrolls; preview renders all; Save completes within reasonable time; all sections persist
Failure_Signals: Designer freezes or becomes unresponsive; sections disappearing; Save timeout; preview blank with many sections

Title: Designer — Page types (Pages vs Blog vs Product template)
Preconditions: Designer open with Pages dropdown accessible
Steps:
1. Open the designer
2. Click the Pages dropdown in the top toolbar
3. Verify available page types are listed (e.g. Pages, Blog, Product template)
4. Select 'Blog' page type
5. Verify the designer loads blog-specific content and sections
6. Select 'Product template' (if available)
7. Verify the designer loads product template layout
8. Switch back to 'Pages'
9. Verify the correct page list loads
Assertions: Pages dropdown shows different page types; switching between types loads the correct content and section configurations; each type has appropriate blocks
Failure_Signals: Dropdown not showing all page types; switching types causes error; wrong content loading for selected type

Title: Designer — Preview mode navigation
Preconditions: Page open in designer with content blocks
Steps:
1. Open a page in the designer with at least 2 blocks
2. Click Preview button in the top toolbar
3. Verify the preview opens (full-screen or new tab/mode)
4. Interact with the preview — scroll, click links
5. Verify the storefront renders correctly with all blocks
6. Exit preview mode (click back or close)
7. Verify you return to the designer editing mode
Assertions: Preview mode shows full storefront rendering with all blocks; interactive (scrollable, links clickable); exiting returns to designer without losing unsaved changes
Failure_Signals: Preview button disabled; preview blank or showing error; cannot exit preview; unsaved changes lost after preview

Title: API — Page search with lifecycle filter
Preconditions: Admin authenticated; API access available
Steps:
1. Call GET ${BACK_URL}/api/page-builder/grouped-pages/search with body: {storeId: '@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)', lifecycle: 'Drafts', take: 10}
2. Verify response contains only Draft pages
3. Call with lifecycle: 'Active'
4. Verify response contains only Published pages within date range
5. Call with lifecycle: 'Archived'
6. Verify response contains only Archived pages or pages past EndDate
7. Call with lifecycle: 'Pending'
8. Verify response contains only Published pages with future StartDate
Assertions: Each lifecycle filter returns correctly filtered pages; response includes page metadata (name, permalink, status, dates, language); total count matches filter
Failure_Signals: Wrong pages returned for lifecycle filter; mixed statuses in results; API error on filter value; pagination broken

Title: API — Page CRUD operations
Preconditions: Admin authenticated via API
Steps:
1. POST ${BACK_URL}/api/page-builder/grouped-pages — create a new page with name, permalink, language, storeId
2. Verify response returns created page with ID and Draft status
3. PUT ${BACK_URL}/api/page-builder/grouped-pages/{id} — update page name
4. Verify response confirms update
5. POST ${BACK_URL}/api/page-builder/grouped-pages/{id}/publish — publish the page
6. GET ${BACK_URL}/api/page-builder/grouped-pages/{id} — verify status is Published
7. POST ${BACK_URL}/api/page-builder/grouped-pages/{id}/archive — archive the page
8. Verify status is Archived
9. Verify storefront returns 404 for the archived page
Assertions: Full CRUD lifecycle works via API: create → update → publish → archive; status transitions are correct; storefront reflects each status change
Failure_Signals: Create returns error; update not persisting; publish not changing status; archive not blocking storefront access

Title: Unpublish — Revert published page to draft
Preconditions: Published page exists; designer open
Steps:
1. Open a published page in the designer
2. Verify Unpublish button is enabled in toolbar
3. Click Unpublish
4. Verify page status transitions back to Draft
5. Navigate to ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink>
6. Verify storefront returns 404 (page no longer published)
7. Navigate to PageBuilder shell — verify page is in Draft tab, not Active
Assertions: Unpublish removes page from storefront; page moves from Active to Draft tab; storefront returns 404; page content is preserved in Draft state for future re-publishing
Cross_Layer_Checks: ADMIN: Page moves from Active to Draft tab; counter updates
Failure_Signals: Unpublish button disabled; page still accessible on storefront after unpublish; page stuck in Active tab; content lost after unpublish

Title: Pagination — Page list with many pages
Preconditions: More than 20 pages exist in at least one lifecycle tab
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-all
2. Verify page list shows first page of results
3. Check pagination controls at bottom (page numbers, arrows)
4. Verify Totals count matches expected number
5. Click next page arrow
6. Verify second page loads with different pages
7. Click previous page arrow
8. Verify returns to first page
Assertions: Pagination controls visible when page count exceeds page size; page navigation works correctly; Totals shows accurate count; no duplicate pages across pages
Failure_Signals: Pagination controls missing; wrong total count; duplicate pages on different pages; navigation arrows not working

Title: Grid sorting — Sort by Name, Modified, Language
Preconditions: Multiple pages exist in PageBuilder shell
Test_Data: Pages with various names and dates
Steps:
1. Navigate to All Pages tab in PageBuilder shell
2. Click the Name column header to sort ascending
3. Verify pages are sorted alphabetically A-Z
4. Click Name again to sort descending
5. Verify pages are sorted Z-A
6. Click Modified column header
7. Verify pages are sorted by modification date
8. Click Language column header
9. Verify pages are grouped/sorted by language code
Assertions: Column headers toggle between ascending/descending sort; sort indicator arrow shows current direction; data reorders correctly per column
Failure_Signals: Sort not responding to clicks; wrong sort order; sort indicator missing; data not reordering
